title: Roadmap: Full Source Ingestion and Indexing
description: Roadmap item for implementing full ingestion and indexing of all relevant sources (GitHub, Notion, local files, AI documents, MCP profiles, governance, tangents, schemas, prompts, policies) to support advanced queries and pre-creation checks.
reason: Important for long-term system coherence and retrieval, but dependent on earlier foundational systems.
trigger_conditions: event DB populated with meaningful history
